source_meta.source_document: LCP Distal Tibia Plate Surgical Technique

systems.system_notes: Distal tibia locking plate system within the DePuy Synthes trauma portfolio for distal tibia and pilon fixation.

trays.tray_notes: Official DePuy Synthes technique and catalog materials describe dedicated distal tibia plating instrumentation.

components.component_notes: Official DePuy Synthes materials describe the distal tibia plate family.
Official inventory materials describe compatible screw fixation for the distal tibia plate system.
Official technique resources describe guide and instrumentation workflow for distal tibia plate application.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Current official sources confirm the distal tibia plate family and inventory references, but a full normalized product-code matrix has not yet been extracted in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper sterile implant listing or broader parts-matrix pass is required for comprehensive product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
